column2: Build predictive models using machine learning and deep learning. Work with Python, pandas, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, data preprocessing, and statistical analysis.
Design and manage cloud infrastructure using AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud. Work with virtualization, networking, deployment automation, and DevOps tools.
Develop scalable backend systems using Python, Java, C++, APIs, databases, Git, debugging, and object-oriented programming.
Analyze business data, create dashboards using Power BI or Tableau, SQL queries, stakeholder communication, and requirement gathering.
Deploy machine learning models, optimize algorithms, work with data pipelines, model evaluation, and cloud ML services.
Develop frontend and backend applications using React, Node.js, databases, REST APIs, authentication, and deployment.
Develop enterprise applications using Java, web services, APIs, SQL databases, version control, and SDLC practices. Work on backend systems, debugging, deployment, and cloud services like AWS.
Lead development teams, manage delivery cycles, work on CRM systems, large-scale enterprise solutions, architecture design, performance optimization, and stakeholder coordination.
Work on Siebel CRM systems, configure modules, manage releases, conduct requirement analysis, and deliver enterprise customer relationship management solutions.
Lead software engineering teams, manage projects, oversee deployments, handle client communication, coordinate cross-functional teams, and ensure timely software delivery.
Develop and deploy scalable applications on AWS cloud infrastructure, manage databases, APIs, CI/CD pipelines, and performance monitoring.
